title: Hero renders dynamic collaboration badge and currently learning text
description: Verifies the homepage Hero section displays the collaboration badge and currently learning text pulled from settings (or at minimum renders non-empty values).

steps.description: Verify text "Currently learning: —" is not visible

title: Hero CTA 'See my work' navigates to Projects page
description: Verifies the primary Hero CTA routes the user from the homepage to the Projects page.

title: Hero CTA 'View achievements' navigates to Achievements page
description: Verifies the secondary Hero CTA routes the user from the homepage to the Achievements page.

title: Hero shows fallback status when settings are unavailable (visual fallback state)
description: Verifies the Hero can display the documented default/fallback values for collaboration status and currently learning text.

steps.description: Verify text "Open to collaborate" is visible

title: Hero content remains readable while settings load (no empty placeholders)
description: Verifies the Hero does not show a blank state for the collaboration badge and currently learning label while data is being resolved.

title: Hero social links are visible and actionable (no navigation required)
description: Verifies the Hero section shows social link controls as visible interactive elements.

steps.description: Verify element "Social link: GitHub" is visible
Verify element "Social link: LinkedIn" is visible

title: Achievements page loads with masonry grid and filter pills
description: Verifies the Achievements page renders the masonry grid and the three expected filter pills.

steps.description: Verify element "Achievements masonry grid" is visible

title: Filter achievements to Certificate and open a certificate in lightbox
description: Verifies the Certificate filter shows certificate items and a selected item opens a lightbox with the full image.

steps.description: Verify element "Certificate achievements results" is visible
Click on the first visible achievement card thumbnail
Verify element "Lightbox full-size image" is visible

title: Filter achievements to Participation and open an item in lightbox
description: Verifies the Participation filter works and an item can be previewed in the lightbox.

steps.description: Verify element "Participation achievements results" is visible
Click on the first visible achievement card thumbnail
Verify element "Lightbox full-size image" is visible

title: Switch filters back to All after filtering
description: Verifies the All filter restores the full set view after selecting another filter.

steps.description: Verify element "Certificate achievements results" is visible
Verify element "All achievements results" is visible

title: Open lightbox and close it with the close control
description: Verifies the lightbox can be closed via the visible close control.

steps.description: Click on the first visible achievement card thumbnail
Verify element "Lightbox dialog" is not visible

title: Verify action is not available when an achievement has no credential URL
description: Verifies an achievement without a credential URL shows a disabled Verify control or an explicit not-available indicator.

steps.description: Click on an achievement card that shows a "Verify not available" indicator or otherwise indicates no credential URL
Verify text "Verify not available" is visible

title: Lightbox image error state shows placeholder and can be dismissed
description: Verifies that when a lightbox image fails to load, an error placeholder is shown and the lightbox can be closed.

steps.description: Click on an achievement card thumbnail that results in a broken image in the lightbox
Verify text "Image failed to load" is visible

title: Featured achievement is visually distinguished and opens in lightbox
description: Verifies featured items are labeled/distinguished and remain functional for lightbox preview.

steps.description: Click on a visible achievement card that is marked "Featured"
Verify element "Lightbox full-size image" is visible

title: Projects page loads and shows pinned/projects grid content
description: Verifies the /projects page renders project cards with expected visible metadata such as status and tech badges.

steps.description: Verify at least one element "project card" is visible
Verify at least one element "tech badge" is visible

title: Open a specific project card (OlivX) to view its expanded/detail content
description: Verifies a project card named "OlivX" can be opened to reveal expanded or detail information.

title: Project cards display status indicators (e.g., Live/Inactive) and key metadata
description: Verifies project cards include visible status text and supporting metadata such as description or technology indicators.

steps.description: Verify at least one element "project card" is visible
Verify at least one element "status" is visible
Verify at least one element "project description" is visible
Verify at least one element "tech badge" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the projects list
Verify at least one element "project card" is visible

title: Fallback scenario: Live button is disabled when a project has no liveUrl
description: Verifies that for a project without a live URL, the UI shows a clear "Live not available" state and the Live action is disabled/unavailable.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the projects list
Click on a project card that shows a "Live" control in a disabled state
Verify text "Live not available" is visible

title: Fallback scenario: Placeholder/manual projects are still interactive (openable)
description: Verifies that when manual/fallback projects are displayed, a user can still open a card and see its available actions and metadata.

steps.description: Verify at least one element "project card" is visible
Click on the first visible project card

title: Projects page remains usable when scrolled: content persists and no blank sections
description: Verifies the projects listing behaves correctly during scrolling and continues to show cards without rendering empty states.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the projects list
Verify at least one element "project card" is visible
Scroll to the top of the projects list

title: Post a guestbook message as a public visitor (no OAuth)
description: Verifies a visitor can submit a name and message and see it appear in the guestbook list.

steps.description: Type "Test Visitor" into the name field
Type "Hello from an automated test." into the message field
Verify text "Hello from an automated test." is visible

title: Validate required message field and then submit successfully
description: Verifies submitting with an empty message shows a validation error and succeeds after correcting the message.

steps.description: Type "Validation Tester" into the name field
Type "Now the message is provided." into the message field
Verify text "Now the message is provided." is visible

title: Guestbook message remains visible after page refresh
description: Verifies a submitted message persists and is visible after reloading the guestbook page.

steps.description: Type "Persistence Tester" into the name field
Type "This entry should persist after refresh." into the message field
Verify text "This entry should persist after refresh." is visible
Verify text "This entry should persist after refresh." is visible

title: Cybill AI reply appears for a newly posted message (best-effort)
description: Verifies that after posting a message, an AI reply from Cybill becomes visible for that entry within a reasonable time window.

steps.description: Type "AI Reply Tester" into the name field
Type "Can you respond to this guestbook entry?" into the message field
Verify text "Can you respond to this guestbook entry?" is visible

title: Prevent empty submission when both name and message are missing
description: Verifies the UI blocks submission and shows a validation error when required fields are not provided.

title: Handle very long guestbook message input gracefully
description: Verifies that a long message can be entered and the UI responds with either successful posting or a visible validation message (no silent failure).

steps.description: Type "Long Message Tester" into the name field

Type "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit." into the message field
Verify text "Long Message Tester" is visible

title: Send a message and receive an AI response rendered in the chat
description: Verifies a visitor can send a chat message and see an AI response displayed in the conversation.

steps.description: Type "Hello Cybill, can you introduce yourself in one sentence?" into the chat input
Verify text "Hello Cybill, can you introduce yourself in one sentence?" is visible
Verify an assistant response message element is visible

title: Markdown formatting appears in AI response (basic bold/heading/list)
description: Verifies the chat UI renders markdown-style content from the assistant in a readable formatted way.

steps.description: Type "Reply using markdown with: a heading, one bullet list item, and one bold word." into the chat input
Verify text "Reply using markdown" is visible
Verify an assistant response message element is visible
Verify element "a markdown-formatted heading in the assistant response" is visible

title: Clear chat history after a conversation
description: Verifies that clearing chat removes prior messages from the visible conversation area.

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the UI does not send a message when the input is empty and does not add an empty bubble to the chat.

steps.description: Verify the send button is visible
Verify an error/validation message indicating the message is required is visible
Verify element "a new user message bubble" is not visible

title: Send message using Enter key (keyboard submit)
description: Verifies the chat input supports sending a message via the Enter key.

steps.description: Type "Send this with Enter" into the chat input
Verify text "Send this with Enter" is visible
Verify an assistant response message element is visible

title: Now Playing widget remains non-intrusive on the home page layout
description: Verifies the home page still shows its primary hero content and the Now Playing widget does not replace core content.

steps.description: Verify an element "Hero heading" is visible
Verify an element "Hero introduction" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify text "Now playing" is either visible in the footer area or not visible at all
